mnemonics: Create Sub Classes with CARE: Classes, Attributes, Relationships, and Extends
keyPoints: Use the 'extends' keyword to inherit from a superclass
Subclasses inherit fields and methods from their parent class
Subclasses can override methods to provide specific implementations
commonMistakes: Forgetting to use the 'extends' keyword when declaring the subclass
Not calling the superclass constructor properly when it has parameters
Creating unnecessary inheritance instead of using composition
